flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rutgers University-New Brunswick rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.8k → $17.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rutgers University-New Brunswick rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.0k → $37.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rutgers University-New Brunswick fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Rutgers University-New Brunswick are 23% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($74.5k vs $60.7k).
